inputs.titre: Sac de Ctésiphon par les Romains

reason: The image depicts Roman soldiers in lorica segmentata armor, helmets, and shields, marching through a city with appropriate architecture for the period. The clothing and equipment appear generally consistent with Roman military practices of the 2nd century AD. The absence of anachronisms and fantastical elements supports its validity. However, the uniformity of the armor and equipment, and the very clean rendering, suggests it may be overly idealized, reducing the score slightly. The image is also likely AI generated, meaning the details are not photographically accurate. The rendering of the mud on the ground is also quite strange. This brings down the score.
